mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, submitted_answer, is_correct, submitted_at FROM user_answer ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, submitted_answer, is_correct, submitted_at FROM user_answer WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, submitted_answer, is_correct, submitted_at FROM user_answer WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_answer (user_id, session_id, item_type, reference_id, submitted_answer, is_correct, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{itemType}, #{referenceId}, #{submittedAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_answer SET user_id = #{userId}, session_id = #{sessionId}, item_type = #{itemType}, reference_id = #{referenceId}, submitted_answer = #{submittedAnswer}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
